Subject: Thank You for a Wonderful Internship

Dear Professor Smith, I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to intern in your department this summer. Your mentorship and the supportive environment you created allowed me to grow significantly while working on meaningful projects that challenged me in positive ways.

Throughout this program, I learned how to analyze complex data sets efficiently and developed strong communication skills by presenting findings to the team. Although we initially faced challenges with limited resources, your steady guidance helped us find creative solutions and complete our tasks successfully. This valuable experience taught me resilience and adaptability, which are skills I will carry forward into my academic career and beyond.

I truly appreciate the time you took to share your wisdom and remain accessible throughout the process. I hope to stay connected as I pursue future opportunities in this field, and I would welcome the chance to collaborate again if possible. Thank you once more for this valuable experience and for your continued support.

Sincerely,  
Jordan Lee
